ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the station in feet */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the station */,
  "data_source_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of data source IDs used by the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather event (e.g., Snow, Rain, Thunderstorm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather event */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the weather event */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data file */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the weather data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the weather data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  "file_compression" TEXT /* Compression method used (e.g., gzip, zip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is approved */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES weather_data_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag (e.g., anomaly, missing data) */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date of the flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the flag (e.g., low, high) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the flag was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_flags_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., data source, collection method) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., technical, operational) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)
